results.title: Thane Hospital Assault: Shiv Sena Corporator Ramesh Mhatre Sent To Police Custody Till July 13 By Kalyan Court
results.description: Shiv Sena corporator Ramesh Mhatre, arrested for allegedly assaulting doctors and hospital staff at Shastri Nagar Hospital in Dombivli, has been sent to police custody till July 13 by Kalyan Court. The order came after he was produced before the court.

results.title: FRI Dehradun Group C Answer Key 2026 Out, Direct Download Link Here
results.description: The Forest Research Institute (FRI), Dehradun, has released the FRI Dehradun Group C Answer Key 2026 on 10th July 2026 at their official website https://friexam.in/.

results.title: FIFA World Cup 2026: CAF hails Morocco's historic WC run after QF exit to France
results.description: The Confederation of African Football (CAF) applauded Morocco's inspiring World Cup campaign, saying their remarkable journey may have come to an end.
